name: notes
description: Built-in Firebat notes — markdown file-based (data/notes/*.md). AI autonomously reads/writes/searches. No external sync (by design). Integrates with other Firebat tools (e.g. sysmod_calendar) via data and tool chains.

action.description: list=list notes (optional tag filter), read=read content by slug, write=create or update a note (overwrites if slug exists), delete=delete by slug (no trash — immediate deletion), search=full-text + tag search

slug.description: [read/write/delete] Note identifier. Allowed characters: letters, digits, _, -. If omitted on write, auto-generated as YYYY-MM-DD-rand.

query.description: [search] Search query (full-text over title + content + tag)

items.description: Results of list/search (slug, title, tags, createdAt, contentPreview)

note.description: Result of read (slug, title, tags, content, createdAt, updatedAt)
